features: High Potency Dose of Science-backed Strains: Meet the high potency version of Ora’s best-selling probiotic Trust Your Gut with 52 Billion probiotics per serving. The probiotic strains in this product have been studied for their potential to support digestive health, immune health, mood, healthy weight management, and a strong intestinal wall.

11 Acid-resistant Strains: Your stomach is extremely acidic, but never fear, the probiotics in Trust Your Gut High Potency are acid-resistant. That means they’re able to survive the acid in your gut to ensure you reap maximum benefits.

Organic Prebiotics To Support Gut Health: Includes the organic prebiotic Jerusalem Artichoke Inulin. Prebiotics act as fuel for probiotics and help ensure they can be at their most effective. They can also support the beneficial bacteria already present in your gut.

No Refrigeration Needed: Unlike most probiotics, Trust Your Gut doesn’t require refrigeration because it's freeze-dried and #readytotravel. This means you can store it at room temperature in your kitchen, on your desk, or in your bathroom! Just be mindful to store your bottle away from any moisture and keep the lid on tight.

Plant-based, Third-party Tested & Allergen-free: This probiotic is completely vegan, and tested at third-party accredited laboratories for gluten, dairy, soy, fish, peanuts, and tree nuts - common allergens that we believe have no business being in a quality probiotic. In total, we test for over 100 contaminants including heavy metals.
ingredients: Ora Probiotic Blend: Lactobacillus plantarum, Lactobacillus acidophilus, Lactobacillus paracasei, Lactobacillus casei, Lactobacillus rhamnosus, Bifidobacterium breve, Bifidobacterium bifidum, Bifidobacterium longum, Lactobacillus gasseri, Lactobacillus salivarius, Lactobacillus brevis, Organic Jerusalem Artichoke Prebiotic, Vegan Capsule (Pullulan), Organic Nu-MAG®° (rice extract, rice hulls, gum arabic, sunflower oil), Organic Nu-FLOW®° (organic rice hulls)
parentTitle: Ora Organic Probiotics and Prebiotics for Digestive Wellness - 16 Billion CFU, 6 Clinically Studied Strains, Vegan, Dairy & Gluten Free | Nourish Your Gut Health, 60 Capsules
productBenefit: Supports digestion, regularity, immune health, mood, healthy weight management and a strong intestinal wall., Gut Health Support, Digestive Health Support, Immune Support, Stomach Health Support, Intestinal Support
safetyWarning: Consult a healthcare professional before use. May cause mild stomach upset or other side effects in some individuals. Not intended for use by pregnant or breastfeeding women. Do not exceed recommended dosage.
specificUsesForProduct: Gut health restoration, microbiome balance, immune system support
title: Ora Organic Probiotics with Prebiotics - 52 Billion CFU 11 Clinically Studied Strains for Digestive Health, Trust Your Gut, Gluten Free, 60 Capsules
